description: The Chambers Brothers were a criminal organization based in Detroit, Michigan, that dominated crack cocaine distribution in the city during the mid-1980s. Founded by four brothers from Marianna, Arkansas, the gang controlled over 50% of Detroit's crack trade, operating around 700 crack houses and generating $3 million daily. They were dismantled after a joint DEA and Detroit Police investigation led to their arrest in 1988 and conviction in 1989.
